Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given a process description with strict rules normative and recommended practices desiderata We have an event log with three cases We need to analyze each case for violations of normative rules and failures to meet desiderata Also we should suggest possible interpretations or justifications

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets restate the normative constraints The process always starts with Application Received Then the strict sequence is Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant If Approved Finalize Documentation Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Ordering rules Credit Check must occur before Risk Assessment Risk Assessment must occur before Loan Decision Inform Applicant must occur after Loan Decision If loan is approved Finalize Documentation must occur before Close Case If loan is rejected do not finalize documentation before closing the case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: What is not allowed Skipping activities in the required sequence Changing the order for example doing Risk Assessment before Credit Check Performing Finalize Documentation after a rejection Closing the case without following the decision logic Approved Finalize Documentation before closing Rejected close without finalization

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: The normative process expects exactly those activities in that order with the conditional for Finalize Documentation However the desiderata mention a Follow up Call which is optional So the process may include extra activities like Follow up Call but they are not required But normative constraints likely only apply to the mandatory activities

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now desiderata Credit Check should be completed within 24 hours after application received Inform Applicant should be done within 48 hours of loan decision It is encouraged to perform a Follow up Call sometime before closing the case Violating desiderata is not a serious problem

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1 Activities in order Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Approved Inform Applicant Finalize Documentation Close Case Check normative Sequence All mandatory activities present Yes all are there Order Correct Credit Check before Risk Assessment Yes Risk Assessment before Loan Decision Yes Inform Applicant after Loan Decision Yes Loan is approved so Finalize Documentation must occur before Close Case Yes Finalize Documentation occurs before Close Case So no normative violations

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Check desiderata Application at 0900 Credit Check at 0930 within 24 hours OK Loan Decision at 1100 Inform Applicant at 1300 same day within 48 hours OK Follow up Call Not present That is a desideratum violation since it is encouraged So case 1 fails to meet the desideratum of having a Follow up Call But it is not a serious violation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 2 Activities Application Received Risk Assessment Credit Check Loan Decision Rejected Finalize Documentation Close Case Check normative normative requires Credit Check before Risk Assessment So order is violated Risk Assessment occurs before Credit Check That is a normative violation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Also Loan Decision is Rejected After rejection Finalize Documentation should not be performed But here we have Finalize Documentation after Loan Decision Rejected That is a normative violation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Also check Inform Applicant is missing The normative sequence says after Loan Decision Inform Applicant must occur But in case 2 there is no Inform Applicant activity That is skipping a required activity which is a normative violation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Check desiderata Credit Check within 24 hours Application at 0800 Credit Check at 0900 within 24 hours So timing is fine Follow up Call Not present but that is a desideratum violation But since there are normative violations desiderata are secondary

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 3 Activities Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Approved Inform Applicant Finalize Documentation Close Case Check normative All mandatory activities present Yes Order Credit Check before Risk Assessment Yes Risk Assessment before Loan Decision Yes Inform Applicant after Loan Decision Yes Loan is approved so Finalize Documentation must occur before Close Case Yes So no normative violations

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Check desiderata Credit Check within 24 hours Application at 0900 on Jan 12 Credit Check at 1000 on Jan 14 That is more than 24 hours later so violates the desideratum Inform Applicant within 48 hours of loan decision Loan Decision at 1200 on Jan 14 Inform Applicant at 1500 on Jan 16 That is more than 48 hours so violates the desideratum Follow up Call Not present violates desideratum

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For case 2 possibly there was an error in logging maybe the Risk Assessment and Credit Check were swapped in order Or maybe the process was not followed correctly

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For case 3 the desiderata violations delays might be due to weekend Jan 12 is Friday and Credit Check on Jan 14 is Sunday so delay over weekend could be a justification Similarly informing applicant might have been delayed due to communication issues The lack of follow up call might be due to policy not being strictly enforced

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: For case 1 the only desideratum violation is missing follow up call Maybe the follow up call is not always necessary if everything is smooth

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Summary Normative violations Case 2 Multiple violations Risk Assessment performed before Credit Check order reversed Inform Applicant activity missing skipped step Finalize Documentation performed after a rejection contradictory action

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Desiderata violations Case 1 Missing Follow up Call Case 2 Missing Follow up Call but normative violations are more serious Case 3 Credit Check delayed beyond 24 hours Inform Applicant delayed beyond 48 hours Missing Follow up Call
